CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-30-2016 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Aug-01-2016 Off Calendar

APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER
Off Calendar Jul-21-2016 Continued To Aug-11-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Ryan L. Dahm of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC (415-989-4730) appears for plaintiff/moving party

Jon Whitehead (415-786-1512) appears as defendant In Propria Persona

Court hears from both sides. There is no proof of service filed but defendant is present. Court grants continuance to allow defendant time to prepare and seek counsel. PLAINTIFF BIRITE RESTAURANT SUPPLY, INC.'S APPLICATION FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is Continued to August 11, 2016 at 9:30 AM in Department 302. Opposition to the application is due by the end of business on July 29, 2016. Reply is due by August 5, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332, Bus. Tel: 415-551-3745. (D302)
